title: habenaria agrestis
intro: Habenaria agrestis, also known as Wild Yellow Orchid, is a species of orchid native to tropical Africa, characterized by its yellow flowers and slender leaves. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Habenaria agrestis include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as its potential to boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, and is also used in traditional remedies to treat various health conditions.
